finding_results.notes: Safe dial sequence now matches the established combination before the safe opens (forty-one, six, twenty-two).

Replaced the summary block with an on-page sequence showing interruption risk at the door, active chain-of-custody threat (timestamp collapse and contamination risk), Lena's bodily stress, and procedural recovery in-scene.

summary: All packet findings were addressed in place: safe-code continuity was reconciled, evidence-capture pressure was restored on-page with chain-risk recovery, and the release decision arc now reads as provisional-first then final under escalated stakes.
